findings.message: Classnames 'rounded-tl-lg, rounded-tr-lg' could be replaced by the 'rounded-t-lg' shorthand!
Classnames 'rounded-bl-md, rounded-br-md' could be replaced by the 'rounded-b-md' shorthand!
Classnames 'rounded-tl-md, rounded-bl-md' could be replaced by the 'rounded-l-md' shorthand!
Classnames 'rounded-tl-md, rounded-tr-md' could be replaced by the 'rounded-t-md' shorthand!
Classnames 'rounded-tr-md, rounded-br-md' could be replaced by the 'rounded-r-md' shorthand!
